examples: We should also talk about NAND.
NAND flash offers higher capacities with significantly faster write and erase performance.
The NAND market has been reeling under falling prices and oversupply despite increasing demand.
The dead also included state Congress party chief Nand Kumar Patel and his son.
Samsung's 128Gb NAND flash is based on a 3-bit multi-level-cell design and 10nm-class process technology.
